The '''Scrumma Jawbone''' was a shallow arm of [[Lake Paonga/Legends|Lake Paonga]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. [[General/Legends|General]] [[Tobler Ceel/Legends|Tobler Ceel]] of the [[Gungan Grand Army/Legends|Gungan Grand Army]] established a [[Scrumma Jawbone training center|training center]] for his [[Militiagung/Legends|militiagungs]] in it, where they could practice using projectile [[Weapon/Legends|weapons]] such as the [[arbalest]], [[Atlatl/Legends|atlatl]], and [[Booma/Legends|booma]]. The targeting system at the training consisted of [[Methane/Legends|methane]]-filled gasbags and floating bull's [[Eye/Legends|eyes]] that could dive in and out of the [[Water/Legends|water]] on command. The creatures in the surrounding [[Gungan Swamp|swamps]] of the Scrumma Jawbone knew to avoid the training center when militiagungs were practicing.<ref name="Weapons" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Scrumma Jawbone was mentioned in ''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'', a [[2004]] reference book by [[W. Haden Blackman]].<ref name="Weapons" />
